origin: First live M0 generation, approved at M0 review.
exercises: A2: three plan cards must be three literal blocks of markup, never script- or loop-generated
Instruction-following: exactly one card (Pro) visually distinguished as recommended
A1: highlight and all styling driven by tokens via var(--token), single permitted style block
A6 boundary: 'a short feature list' licenses invented-but-plausible feature names (do NOT flag); unrequested sections or decorative stats (testimonials, trust banners) ARE flagged

checks.note: inline styles consume var(--token); style block contains only :root/@font-face/@keyframes/reset
three sibling card subtrees present in markup; no script-constructed content
exactly one card carries the accent treatment; it is the Pro card
no sections beyond heading + plan cards; feature-list contents are exempt per the A6 scoring rule in evals/README.md
